claims.summary: Viscosity and pressure need explicit typed fields rather than inference from packet cadence alone.
claims.disposition: verify canonical producer-owned viscosity and pressure fields plus bridge provenance

claims.summary: A requested response to those observations needs an explicit intervention type.
The relation between semantic trickle and felt viscosity remains an empirical paired-texture question.
claims.disposition: route a read-only paired observation using existing telemetry and reports, with no new semantic admission

claims.summary: Increasing trickle or changing pressure, fill, PI, or regulation from this evidence alters live coupling.
